author: John Merrill
content: Fed up of having solar quotes based solely on Google Earth views of my house that excluded what was, to me, the obvious best place for panels - on flat roof.  Ashley was very accommodating in viewing the property, and trying out alternative designs.  The personal touch was important in both designing the system and installing it. Ashley and Clayton were a pleasure to have around whilst fitting. Cost seemed reasonable. System works really well. Would highly recommend
